definitions.name: last_bp_time
definitions.source: IP_FLWSHT_MEAS (Inpatient flowsheet measurements (vitals, assessments)), PAT_ENC_HSP (Hospital patient encounters (inpatient, ED, observation))
conditions: Flowsheet measurement type (5=Blood Pressure, 8=Heart Rate, etc.) equals '5'
definitions.technical_expression: (SELECT MAX(ip_flwsht_meas.recorded_time) FROM ip_flwsht_meas AS fm WHERE ip_flwsht_meas.pat_enc_csn_id = pat_enc_hsp.pat_enc_csn_id AND ip_flwsht_meas.flo_meas_id = '5')

definitions.name: filter:where:IP_FLWSHT_MEAS.PAT_ENC_CSN_ID
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Encounter identifier equals pat_enc_hsp.pat_enc_csn_id
definitions.source: IP_FLWSHT_MEAS (Inpatient flowsheet measurements (vitals, assessments)), PAT_ENC_HSP (Hospital patient encounters (inpatient, ED, observation))

definitions.name: filter:where:IP_FLWSHT_MEAS.FLO_MEAS_ID
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Flowsheet measurement type (5=Blood Pressure, 8=Heart Rate, etc.) equals '5'

definitions.name: MAX(fm.RECORDED_TIME)
definitions.business_description: Maximum of Time the measurement was recorded
conditions: Flowsheet measurement type (5=Blood Pressure, 8=Heart Rate, etc.) equals '5'

definitions.name: filter:where:IP_FLWSHT_MEAS.PAT_ENC_CSN_ID
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Encounter identifier equals e.pat_enc_csn_id

definitions.name: filter:where:IP_FLWSHT_MEAS.FLO_MEAS_ID
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Flowsheet measurement type (5=Blood Pressure, 8=Heart Rate, etc.) equals '5'
